name_en: Cherry Blossom🌸 Pink🔮🔮🔮 OHANEL🚩🚩🚩25B Heavyweight, don't blink😉, small bucket bag, instantly falling in love with the ethereal cream white. Classic diamond quilted stitching + mini double C logo, low-key and luxurious.· Pull the drawstring to instantly become a "🤩🤩 lucky bag", full anti-theft skills.· The chain ⛓️ length can be worn on the shoulder, crossbody, or slung casually, friendly for petite frames. Instantly photogenic with a Southern France vacation vibe! This one is on the "heirloom" list, sisters waiting for 25B, go for it! The elegance of the diamond quilt, the embellishment of the gold chain, this black handbag is simply too high-end. Large and small pocket design, practical and stylish, paired with gold metal ring details, texture maxed out~ Light luxury style! 4775Size: 12.5×10×7cm
